message:
feat(pijs): add globals + shims + fix TS oracle JSON parsing (bd-2ej3)

- Add AbortController/AbortSignal, structuredClone, queueMicrotask,
  performance.now polyfills to PI_BRIDGE_JS globals
- Enhance process global: stdout/stderr/stdin, nextTick, hrtime,
  version, arch, pid, on/off/once
- Add virtual modules: node:string_decoder, node:querystring,
  node:process with bare aliases
- Fix TS oracle JSON parser to tolerate pre-JSON stdout text
  (e.g. "[WakaTime] Installing wakatime-cli..." before JSON)
- Fix clippy format_push_string lints in CJS-to-ESM converter

Community conformance: 52/58 pass (89.7%, up from 72.4%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
